response.justification: Despite a strong background in software development and diverse technical experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation, cloud platforms, or secure systems per IEC 62443, and has no demonstrated work with STL, multi-threading, message brokers, MQTT, or industrial protocols critical to the role; their recent work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with a career gap and no evidence of leading C++ architecture or SDL compliance.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to lead and mentor via workshops and community projects
concerns: No recent or relevant C++/STL experience in industrial or secure systems
Lacks exposure to IEC 62443, MQTT, message brokers, or industrial protocols
Career gap and absence of cloud/on-prem automation platform delivery
